titleStmt.title: SII 8.498: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 498. (A.R. No. 199 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . cakaraiyāṇṭu 1000 2 100 4 10 2- ṉmel cellāniṉṟa raudri
samvatsara ttu vṛści kanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa ttu tri tiyaiyum tiṅkaḷki
ḻamaiyum peṟṟa mulattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu Āṟṟūrnā
ṭṭu tirukkāḷattiāṉa mummuṭicoḻapurattu mahātevarāṉa tirumaṇikkeṅkai
cciyaṉeṉ tirumaṇikkeṅkaiyil Uṭaiyār tirumaṇikkeṅkaiuṭai
ya nāyaṉār koyilukku vaṭakkuttiruviti kiḻciṟakil Ikkoyilukku vaṭakku
tirumatiḷukku vaṭakku Iṉṉāyaṉār paṇṭāram kol mukkālearaikkālukku vaṭak
ku Āvuṭaittevamutaliyār maṭamāy Ivar peraṉ Āvuṭaittevarum tikkāṉaiāṇṭā
rum maṭamāṉa maṭattil Inta Āvuṭaittevar Opātiyāy Ivarpakkal muṉpi lāṇṭu śrī
irājakaṇṭakopālatevarkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu Āṭimātattu paṇam Irupattuaiñcukku
koṇṭa teṟkaṭaiyap pātiyum Inta tikkāṉaiāṇṭār Opātiyāy Ivar makaṉ mutalippi
ḷḷaiyum kāḷattinātaṉum keṅkarumpakkal Eṭṭāvatu paṅkuṉimātattu Ittiruviti me
lciṟakil tiruppācūruṭaiyār maṭattukku vaṭakku pittirikaḷmaṭattukku teṟku Uṭaiyā
r tirumaṇikkeṅkaiuṭaiya nāyanār paṇṭāra maṭamāy tirukkaḻippālaiuṭaiyār Iru
nta maṭamum paṇam Eṭṭum kuṭuttu Itukku talaimāṟu Ivarkaḷpakkal koṇṭa va
ṭakkaṭaiyap pātiyum Āka Immaṭam Eṭuppu Uṭpaṭavum Immaṭattukku vaṭakku U
ṭaiyār pā cupatīśvara muṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilukku teṟku tirukkāḷattiā
ṇṭārmaṭattil vaṭakkaṭaiyap pañcāṇṭaicciyar pātiyāy kalmaṭattumutaliyār
kku Ivar kuṭutta pāti nikki teṟkaṭaiyappātiyil kaṇṭārkātalittārum Ivan tampi
tevarkaḷum cellappiḷḷaiyum Ivarkaḷ tamaiyanār cittaṇaṉ makaṉ koyilkāttā rum Opātiyā
y Ivarkaḷpakkal kālayuktisamvatsara ttu mācimātattu paṇam toṇṇūṟṟueṭṭuk
kuk koṇṭa vaṭakkaṭaiyap pātiyum teṟkaṭaiyap pātiyil tavapperuntevuceytār Opātiāy I
varpakkal raudrisamvatsara ttu Āvaṇimātattu paṇam nāṟpattuoṉpatukku koṇṭa vaṭakkaṭai
yap pātiyum kaliyukameyyar Opātiāy Ivarpakkal Inta raudrisamvatsara ttu Aippacimātattu
paṇam Aimpatukku koṇṭa teṟkaṭaiyap pātiyum Ākat tirumaṇikkeṅkaiuṭaiya nāyaṉār
koyil vaṭakkut tirumatiḷukku vaṭakku Iṉnāyaṉār paṇṭāramkol mukkāle Araikkāluk
ku vaṭakku kalmaṭattumutaliyār maṭattukku teṟku Ivvaṉaivar maṭaṅkaḷum Intamaṭaṅkaḷāl vanta vā
lnīḷamum Uṭaiyār tirumaṇikkeṅkaiuṭaiya nāyaṉār śrīpaṇṭārauṭal Iṭṭu Iṉnāyaṉārk
ku tirunāmattukkāṇiākak koṇṭeṉ mahātevanāṉa tirumaṇikkeṅkaicciyaṉeṉ . Ivai
mahātevanāṉa tirumaṇikkeṅkaicciyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āvuṭaittevar Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 8.498 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
